title: knesebeckia pedata
intro: Knesebeckia pedata, also known as Chinese thornclover or thorn clover, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antipyretic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and improving cardiovascular health. Knesebeckia pedata can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to make tonics and salves.
